name: SUNRISE REAL ESTATE GROUP INC
headquarters: Texas (holding company); operations in Shanghai, China
summary: Sunrise Real Estate Group, Inc. (SRRE) is a Texas holding company conducting business through subsidiaries in China. Principal activities include real estate development, property leasing services, and property management services in the PRC. Operating subsidiaries SHXJY and SHSY are property agency businesses earning commission revenue from marketing and sales services to developers. The company also has interests in residential land development projects through LYSY.
